videos.title: AO x NTS Radio - Ep 5: Ghanaian Underground
videos.description:
AO RADIO PRESENTS GHANAIAN UNDERGROUND W/ ANASTASIA, ENYO, NANA NYAHAN, & MUUD SWINGZ
Played live on NTS Radio on 16/07/26

Africa Only Radio Episode 5 explores the Ghanaian underground scene.
Featuring selections from Anastasia Cobbinah, founder of Palm Moments, curator and cultural programmer, ENYO, a creative organizer working with music and words, Nana Nyahan, a visual artist across ceramics, graphic design and tattooing, and Muud Swingz, a curator and DJ. Mixed by Haram.

95ANTNY - UNDER THE SUN
Narah - No Time
S3KYEREWAA - Someday (prod. by Tino Studios)
Enyonam Afi - dumsor & my new nokia
seyyoh - growing up
The ART - Dah Welcome
ESS THEE LEGEND x SAFO NP - SIMPLEST OF THINGS (prod. by andi stretcher) (unreleased)
OBED - TNGHT
RIE OSEI - EMERGENCY (unreleased)
BOISTORY & RVDICAL THE KID - Balance
Fad Lan - DAGBANA
Reez ft. Nopé - THEBOSS (unreleased)
Pure Akan - Nketenkete
Ria Boss ft. T Neeya - Damn
PHILASHLY, REINNA & DIDI DJ - FALL II
TMSKDJ & GASMILLA - MACHO
SEYYOH, BAABA J - Runaway
SisterDeborah & OhemaaDadao - LittleLight
The ART ft. Marince Omario - Cruize
Emma Korantema - Surveillance (Gluttony)
YOKOTHEMOON - Marche (Unreleased)
THE VILLAGE - GH GOLD (unreleased)
